findings.issue: ZH choice[3] retains raw kana 'エ．' instead of normalized 'D．'. EN side is correctly 'D. 15'. Inconsistent normalization within same question.
BOTH ZH and EN choices[2] and choices[3] retain raw kana labels 'ウ．' / 'エ．' instead of C./D. — EN side particularly broken (English text contains Japanese characters). Confirms R9-A flag.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize zh to 'C．c、a、b' / 'D．c、b、a' and en to 'C. c, a, b' / 'D. c, b, a'.

findings.jp: ア．正規化 / イ．タイマ監視 / ウ．ロールフォワード / エ．ロック／アンロック
findings.zh: ア．规范化 / イ．定时器监视 / ウ．前滚（Roll Forward） / エ．加锁／解锁
findings.en: ア．Normalization / i. Timer Monitoring / u. Roll Forward / e. Lock/Unlock
findings.issue: All 4 ZH choices retain raw kana 'ア/イ/ウ/エ' markers. EN choices use romanised kana 'ア./i./u./e.' — mixed: choice[0] keeps raw 'ア．Normalization', choices[1-3] use Hepburn romaji 'i./u./e.' for イ/ウ/エ. Confirms R9-A flag. EN labels are not valid A/B/C/D markers.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize ZH to 'A．/B．/C．/D．' and EN to 'A./B./C./D.' across all 4 choices; remove katakana and romaji-of-katakana labels.

findings.jp: 問題13-5 2台のPCによる並行更新処理①～④
findings.zh: 问题13-5 两台PC的并发更新处理①～④
findings.en: Problem 13-5: Concurrent Update Processing by Two PCs ①–④
findings.issue: Faithful; minor: JP uses 並行 (parallel/concurrent both fine). Clean.
